Idea - Description:
Idea:
Panic attacks strike silently — existing wearables detect them too late, cost a fortune, and need constant internet. There is no affordable, private, real-time solution that both predicts and calms panic on the spot.
Description:
Tranquility Helper is a low-cost AI-powered wristband that uses EDA, heart rate, and micro-tremor sensors to predict panic attacks 30–60 seconds before symptoms appear — running fully on-device using TinyML with zero internet dependency. When panic is detected, it automatically activates a phase-locked haptic vibration that physically slows the heart rate back to calm over 60 seconds, while simultaneously alerting the caregiver via Telegram. Built for ₹830–₹1,730, it is 100× cheaper than any clinical alternative and works even in rural areas via LoRa — making real-time mental health intervention accessible to everyone, everywhere.

Idea - Description:
Project Aegis solves the 'Reaction Gap' in urban security, where traditional CCTV only records crimes but fails to stop escapes. We have developed a 100% web-based AI Command Center that transforms passive surveillance into an active intervention system.  
Using a live web-cam feed, our system employs YOLOv11 for real-time behavioral anomaly detection and MediaPipe for pose estimation to identify criminal gestures like vandalism or theft. Once a threat is validated, the AI executes an Autonomous Digital Lockdown: it programmatically overrides virtual city traffic APIs to create tactical congestion, trapping the suspect within a 'Digital Cage'.  
The entire solution is visualized through a 3D Digital Twin dashboard (built with React and Three.js), providing law enforcement with real-time containment coordinates and non-ID suspect tracking via DeepSort. This infrastructure-agnostic approach requires no new hardware, making it a highly scalable SaaS model for modern autonomous city governance."
Idea - Title: AI-Powered Active Urban Containment & Tactical Response Grid.

Idea - Description:
The proposed system is an advanced AI driven traffic management solution designed to optimize traffic flow in real time across different environments, including growing cities, metropolitan regions, and smaller towns. It uses computer vision, machine learning, and intelligent decision systems to improve traffic movement, reduce congestion, and enhance overall efficiency.

At its core, the system integrates live camera feeds and sensor data to continuously monitor traffic conditions. Using reinforcement learning models, it adjusts signal timings dynamically, prioritizes emergency vehicles, and ensures smoother vehicle movement without the need for constant manual control.

One of the major strengths of this system is its scalability. It can be initially implemented in cities like Nashik, where traffic is increasing but still manageable for pilot testing. Based on results, the system can be expanded to metropolitan areas such as Delhi, where traffic congestion is a major challenge and requires real time intelligent solutions.

The system is also suitable for smaller towns like Chandwad and Manmad, where traffic systems are still basic and can benefit significantly from automation. This ensures that the solution is inclusive and not limited only to large cities.
From an administrative perspective, the system provides a centralized dashboard for traffic authorities and city officials. This allows real time monitoring, manual control during special situations such as emergency or public events, and better decision making using collected data.

Overall, this system creates a smart and adaptive traffic ecosystem that improves efficiency, reduces delays, supports emergency response, and can be applied across cities of all sizes for future ready urban development.
Idea - Title: AI Powered Real Time Traffic Optimization System for Smart Urban and Semi Urban Mobility.

Idea - Description:
FuelSense is an intelligent, AI-driven smart fuel station monitoring and decision-support 
system designed to address real-world challenges such as long queues, fuel unavailability, 
and inefficient fuel station management. The system integrates Artificial Intelligence, 
Machine Learning, and real-time data processing to provide users with optimized fuel station 
selection and enhanced operational efficiency for fuel station operators. 
The platform is developed using a full-stack architecture comprising Java Spring Boot for 
backend services, JSP for frontend, and MySQL for database management. It utilizes Google 
Maps and Places API for real-time location-based fuel station discovery. A key innovation of 
FuelSense is the integration of computer vision techniques using OpenCV and YOLO (You 
Only Look Once) for real-time vehicle detection and queue estimation at fuel stations. 
To enhance accuracy and automation, the system incorporates machine learning models for 
predicting crowd levels and estimating waiting times based on historical queue data, time 
patterns, and vehicle density. Advanced tracking algorithms such as DeepSORT are used to 
count unique vehicles and avoid duplication, ensuring reliable data. 
The system also features a smart recommendation engine that suggests the best fuel station 
to users based on distance, queue length, and fuel availability. Additionally, route 
optimization is implemented using mapping APIs to guide users to the most efficient 
location. A dynamic notification system alerts users and operators about high crowd levels, 
low fuel availability, and predictive insights generated by AI models. 
FuelSense includes a comprehensive operator dashboard with inventory management, real
t
ime updates of fuel stock, price, and amenities, along with analytics dashboards powered 
by Chart.js to visualize peak hours, fuel usage trends, and demand patterns. The system also 
supports feedback and complaint management, ensuring improved service quality. 
By combining AI-based prediction, computer vision, real-time analytics, and smart 
automation, FuelSense transforms traditional fuel station systems into an intelligent, 
scalable, and smart-city-ready solution. This project demonstrates the practical application 
of AI/ML in solving real-world problems and has strong potential for deployment in urban 
infrastructure systems.
Idea - Title: FuelSense – AI-Powered Smart Fuel Station Monitoring and Recommendation System

Idea - Description:
HealthGuard AI is a next-generation preventive healthcare platform designed to shift medical care from reactive treatment to proactive risk management. The system leverages artificial intelligence and machine learning to analyze personal health parameters such as blood pressure, heart rate, body metrics, and lifestyle patterns to estimate an individual’s risk of developing chronic conditions like hypertension, cardiovascular disorders, and diabetes.
Rather than providing direct diagnoses, HealthGuard AI focuses on probabilistic risk assessment, delivering clear and interpretable health risk scores along with the key contributing factors. It continuously monitors user data, identifies emerging patterns, and detects early warning signs that may otherwise go unnoticed.
The platform provides personalized, actionable recommendations including lifestyle adjustments, dietary guidance, and timely medical consultation alerts. It also maintains a secure, longitudinal health record, enabling users to track trends and make informed health decisions over time.
By combining data intelligence with preventive care, HealthGuard AI aims to empower individuals to take control of their health, reduce long-term medical risks, and promote a smarter, data-driven approach to wellness.
Idea - Title: AI Policy Simulator for Smart Cities

Idea - Description:
CivicTech is a smart civic issue management platform designed to transform how public problems are reported and resolved. Unlike traditional systems like Swachhata App that focus mainly on complaint collection, CivicTech ensures end-to-end resolution with accountability, transparency, and real-time tracking.

The platform connects citizens, government authorities, and NGOs into a unified ecosystem where issues such as garbage mismanagement, faulty street lights, public hygiene concerns, and injured animals can be reported instantly using images and geotagging. Each complaint is tracked through a parcel-like system, allowing users to monitor every stage from submission to resolution.

CivicTech integrates AI-powered verification to detect the authenticity of complaints, prevent spam, and compare before-and-after images to ensure genuine resolution. This is further strengthened by crowd verification, where nearby users confirm whether an issue has actually been resolved, creating a system that minimizes false reporting and fake task completion.

A key feature of the platform is its SLA-based accountability system, where every complaint is assigned a strict resolution timeframe. Delays automatically trigger escalations and impact the performance ratings of responsible authorities, ensuring timely action. The system also introduces a public pressure mechanism, where issues gain visibility and priority based on user engagement and impact.

To enhance transparency, CivicTech provides a live dashboard and heatmap visualization, highlighting neglected and well-maintained areas across the city. Additionally, the platform includes a dedicated animal rescue module, enabling users to quickly report injured animals and connect with nearby NGOs, with optional donation support for treatment.

By combining AI, real-time tracking, public participation, and performance transparency, CivicTech aims to create a data-driven, accountable, and citizen-centric governance system that ensures problems are not just reported—but actually solved.

Idea - Description:
Problem Statement:
Many engineering students, despite having strong technical knowledge, struggle during campus placements due to a lack of English speaking confidence and the inability to explain technical concepts clearly. Existing AI tools are either too general or too expensive for students.

Solution:
Voice Verse is an AI-powered web application designed specifically for engineering students. It uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) to analyze a user's speech in real-time. It provides two layers of feedback:

Fluency Analysis: Detects filler words (ums/ahs) and pacing.

Technical Accuracy: Checks for essential keywords based on the engineering topic (e.g., "HTML tags," "Data structures") to ensure the student is explaining the concept correctly.

Key Features:

Speech-to-Text Analysis: Highlights unclear pronunciation.

Keyword Scoring: Verifies technical depth.

Progress Dashboard: Tracks improvement over time for students' 15-day or 30-day challenges.

Impact:
Voice Verse empowers students to move from "learning to code" to "communicating like a pro," significantly increasing their chances of success in technical interviews and global competitions.
Idea - Title: Voice Verse: The AI Placement Pilot

Idea - Description:
In India, over 600 million people have no access to affordable legal help. Common citizens — farmers, tenants, daily wage workers — face legal problems every day but cannot afford lawyers or understand complex legal language. This leads to injustice, exploitation, and helplessness.
NyayMitra AI solves this by acting as a 24/7 AI-powered legal friend. The user simply speaks or types their problem in Hindi, Marathi, or English. Our AI then identifies the exact law and IPC/BNS section that applies, explains their legal rights in simple everyday language, tells them exactly which authority to approach and what documents to carry, and automatically generates a professional legal notice or complaint letter as a print-ready PDF.
Built using Google Gemini API, LangChain, FastAPI, and React.js, NyayMitra AI is fast, accurate, multilingual, and completely free to use. With voice input support via Whisper, even low-literacy users can access justice.
NyayMitra AI does not replace lawyers — it empowers people to understand their situation before reaching one, reducing exploitation and increasing legal awareness across India.
Idea - Title: NyayMitra AI — AI-Powered Legal Assistant for Every Indian

Idea - Description:
VAIDYASETU is an AI-powered rural health triage system designed to assist doctors in Primary Health Centres (PHCs) with fast, accurate, and reliable clinical decision support—especially in low-resource and low-connectivity environments.

In many rural areas, PHCs serve large populations with limited medical staff and no access to specialists. Critical decisions are often made based on experience rather than structured systems, leading to missed emergencies or unnecessary referrals.

VAIDYASETU solves this by providing a hybrid AI system that works both online and offline. Doctors input basic patient data such as age, symptoms, and vital signs, and the system instantly outputs severity level, recommended action, and reasoning. In critical cases, it generates a bilingual referral letter (Hindi + English) for immediate escalation.

The system automatically switches between an online AI model for advanced inference and an offline decision model during internet outages, ensuring uninterrupted operation. All data is processed and stored locally using lightweight infrastructure, making it privacy-first and deployable even in remote settings.

By enabling sub-10-second triage decisions, VAIDYASETU reduces doctor workload, improves early detection of critical cases, and enhances the overall efficiency of rural healthcare delivery.
Idea - Title: VAIDYASETU: Offline AI-Powered Rural Health Triage System

A Smart Traffic Management System uses **IoT sensors and controllers** to monitor vehicle density and automatically adjust traffic signal timings in real time.

**How it works:** Sensors detect traffic → data sent to microcontroller → signals change based on congestion.

**Components:** Sensors, Arduino/Raspberry Pi, traffic lights, Wi-Fi module.

**Benefits:** Less congestion, reduced waiting time, saves fuel, lowers pollution.

**Use:** Smart cities and busy intersections.
Idea - Description:
## 🚦 Smart Traffic Management System using IoT —   Description

This project focuses on developing an intelligent traffic control system using IoT technology to reduce congestion and improve road efficiency. Traditional traffic lights work on fixed timers, which often leads to unnecessary delays. In this system, sensors are placed at road intersections to detect the number of vehicles in each lane.

The collected data is sent to a microcontroller (such as Arduino or Raspberry Pi), which processes the information and adjusts traffic signal timings dynamically. Roads with higher traffic density get longer green signals, while less crowded roads get shorter durations.

The system can also send real-time traffic data to a cloud platform for monitoring and analysis. This helps in better traffic planning and management.

Overall, the project aims to save time, reduce fuel consumption, and minimize air pollution by making traffic systems smarter and more efficient.

Idea - Description:
The CO₂ Carbon Footprint Tracker & Marine Debris Detection System is an AI-powered platform designed to tackle two critical environmental challenges — rising carbon emissions and increasing ocean pollution.

The system uses satellite imagery from the Sentinel-2 mission under the Copernicus Programme by the European Space Agency, combined with machine learning models, to provide real-time environmental insights.

The first module allows users to calculate and track their carbon footprint based on daily activities such as transportation, energy usage, and fuel consumption. It provides a personalized carbon score and suggests practical ways to reduce emissions, helping users adopt a more sustainable lifestyle.

The second module focuses on detecting marine debris, especially plastic waste, in oceans and coastal regions. Using satellite image analysis and AI-based classification techniques, the system identifies polluted areas and helps authorities take timely action for cleanup and environmental protection.

By combining personal carbon tracking with large-scale environmental monitoring, this platform bridges the gap between individual responsibility and global impact. It empowers users, businesses, and governments to make data-driven decisions for a cleaner and more sustainable future.
Idea - Title: Co2 Carbon Footprint Tracker And Marine Debris Detection using Sentinel 2

Idea - Description:
Current municipal complaint systems are manual, slow, and lack transparency, leading to unresolved civic issues and low public trust. BAGA (Bharat Autonomous Governance Agent) is an Agentic AI platform designed to automate and optimize how Smart Cities handle public infrastructure complaints.

When a citizen submits an unstructured, natural language complaint (e.g., "major water pipe burst on MG Road"), the system utilizes a Zero-Shot LLM workflow to autonomously understand the context, extract the location, assign a priority level, and route the ticket to the correct municipal department without human intervention. Simultaneously, a lightweight Machine Learning model (Random Forest) analyzes historical data to predict a realistic resolution timeline for the citizen. By integrating a Flask AI microservice with a real-time Next.js and Firestore dashboard, the platform eliminates manual triage bottlenecks, ensures departmental accountability, and provides citizens with instant, transparent updates on urban maintenance.

Idea - Description:
Small and marginal farmers in India lose 15–25% of their crop yield annually due to undetected or mismanaged crop diseases. They lack access to affordable agronomist advice and often apply the wrong fertilizer or incorrect dosage, causing further crop damage and financial loss.
CropDoc solves this by allowing farmers to simply upload a photo of a diseased crop leaf. Our AI system — powered by Google Gemini Vision API — instantly detects the disease and provides a complete treatment plan including the recommended fertilizer, dosage per acre, and application method (spray or soil). The entire process takes under 10 seconds and works on any smartphone browser at zero cost to the farmer.
Unlike existing solutions that only detect diseases, CropDoc delivers a full actionable recommendation — making it directly usable by farmers without any technical knowledge or expert intervention.
Idea - Title: AI-Powered Crop Disease Detection and Fertilizer Recommendation System

Idea - Description:
India has over 5 crore pending criminal cases. Police officers spend 70% of their time on paperwork, manual evidence review, and chasing dead-end leads. KAVACH (meaning "shield") is an AI-powered judicial intelligence platform built exclusively for law enforcement officers to solve cases faster, smarter, and with fewer resources.
KAVACH integrates six core AI modules into a single dashboard: (1) Evidence Analysis AI that reads thousands of documents, call records, and reports instantly — finding hidden links, contradictions, and suspect timelines humans miss; (2) Facial Recognition that matches suspects from CCTV footage, even partial or low-quality images, against a national biometric database; (3) Crime Linkage Intelligence that detects when crimes across different locations and dates share the same behavioral signature — identifying serial offenders police would otherwise never connect; (4) Anonymous Tip Engine with AI credibility scoring, layered anonymity, and a smart reward system that activates only after conviction — eliminating fraud while protecting informants; (5) One-Click FIR + Smart Legal Assistant that lets citizens describe their problem in plain language and auto-generates a legally accurate complaint draft with applicable IPC/BNS sections; and (6) Deepfake & Forensic Detection AI that verifies evidence authenticity through metadata analysis, tamper detection, and deepfake probability scoring.
The MVP is built for a law enforcement officer audience first — no public access, no sensitive data, all dummy data — with the intent to present to state authorities for integration with existing police datasets and legal approval. KAVACH does not replace the law. It gives investigators a force multiplier to work within it.
Idea - Title: KAVACH — AI-Powered Criminal Intelligence Platform for Law Enforcement

If Other, please provide details of the: Rapid AI Prototyping for Accessibility: Speech-to-Code System with Real-Time Audio Feedback for Blind Developers
Idea - Description:
Speech2Logic Pro is an AI-powered voice-driven programming system designed to make coding accessible for visually impaired developers.
The system captures user speech and uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) to understand intent, converting it into structured programming logic and executable code in real time. An integrated explainability engine further simplifies the generated code into easy-to-understand steps.
A key innovation of the system is its Audio IDE with voice command capabilities, allowing users to interact with code without a screen. Users can generate, navigate, and modify code using voice commands such as “Explain this code”, “Read next line”, and “Fix error”.
The system follows a real-time pipeline:
Speech Input → Intent Detection → Code Generation → Explanation → Audio Output → Voice Navigation
Additionally, the system proposes a Voice-Based Collaboration Module as a future enhancement, enabling blind developers to participate in coding meetings, receive audio summaries, assign tasks using voice, and collaborate efficiently without visual interfaces.
Existing AI coding tools are not fully accessible to visually impaired users as they rely heavily on visual interfaces and typing. Our system provides a complete voice-driven development environment
Idea - Title: Speech2Logic Pro: Voice-Controlled AI Coding Assistant with Audio Navigation for Blind Developers

Idea - Description:
AaaS Labs is an AI-powered cybersecurity platform designed to automatically detect, explain, and remediate vulnerabilities in both source code and deployed applications.

In today’s development landscape, the rapid rise of AI-generated code and fast-paced deployments has significantly increased the risk of hidden security flaws. Traditional security tools, while powerful, are often complex, require expert knowledge, and primarily focus on detection rather than resolution.

AaaS Labs addresses this gap by transforming security from a manual, expert-driven process into an intelligent, automated workflow.

What AaaS Labs Does

The platform provides end-to-end security coverage by analyzing:

Codebases via GitHub integration
Live applications through domain-based scanning

It leverages industry-standard tools such as Nmap, SQLMap, Gobuster, and WPScan to identify vulnerabilities aligned with OWASP Top 10 and SANS Top 25 standards.

AI-Powered Security Intelligence

A key innovation of AaaS Labs is its “Talk to Your Code” feature, which allows users to interact with their code using natural language. Instead of reading complex security reports, users can ask:

“Why is this vulnerable?”
“How can this be exploited?”

The AI engine responds with:

Clear explanations
Risk assessment
Practical remediation steps

This bridges the critical gap between vulnerability detection and developer understanding.

Visual Remediation with Flowcharts

To further simplify security, AaaS Labs generates AI-driven flowcharts that visually guide users through the process of fixing vulnerabilities step-by-step.

This makes it easier for developers — especially those without deep security expertise — to quickly understand and resolve issues.

No-Code Security Workflow Automation

AaaS Labs includes a no-code workflow engine that allows users to automate security processes such as:

Scheduled vulnerability scans
Real-time alerts (Slack, Email)
Automatic GitHub issue creation

This enables continuous security monitoring without manual intervention, making the platform accessible to both technical and non-technical users.
Idea - Title: AaaS Labs — AI-Powered Automated Attack & Security Platform

Idea - Description:
AgenticArmor is an AI-powered, cloud-based intrusion detection system designed to monitor, analyze, and respond to network threats in real time. The system leverages a hybrid machine learning approach using Random Forest for attack classification and Isolation Forest for anomaly detection, enabling it to identify both known and zero-day cyber attacks.

What makes AgenticArmor unique is its integration of Generative AI (Google Gemini), which transforms complex technical detections into simple, human-readable explanations. This allows even non-expert users to understand the nature and severity of cyber threats.

In addition, the system includes an autonomous AI agent that recommends appropriate actions such as blocking malicious IP addresses, alerting administrators, or monitoring suspicious activity. The backend is deployed on Google Cloud Run, ensuring scalability, reliability, and real-time performance, while Firebase Authentication provides secure user access.

AgenticArmor combines detection, explanation, and response into a single intelligent platform, making cybersecurity more accessible, proactive, and efficient.
Idea - Title: AgenticArmor: AI-Powered Real-Time Intrusion Detection and Response System

If Other, please provide details of the: AIML for Cybersecurity with AIML for Social Change & Awarness
Idea - Description:
Problem Description
The current cybersecurity landscape is fundamentally broken because it treats public safety and enterprise security as two completely isolated worlds. On one hand, the general public is left defenseless against highly sophisticated, AI-driven social engineering (Deepfakes, Zero-Day Phishing). On the other hand, enterprises rely on surface-level software and traditional firewalls that are completely blind to human error and easily bypassed by rogue insiders using VPNs. There is no unified ecosystem bridging public cyber-awareness with hardcore, OS-level endpoint enforcement.

Target Users / Stakeholders
The General Public & Everyday Consumers (B2C): Individuals vulnerable to financial fraud, phishing links, and synthetic media scams, who lack accessible AI verification tools.
Enterprise IT Admins & CISOs (B2B): Corporate security teams who need tamper-proof, Zero-Trust network architectures and strict OS-level compliance for their workforce.
Vulnerable Demographics: Senior citizens and non-tech-savvy users who urgently need automated, NLP-guided helpdesk systems during cyber-incidents.

Significance of the Problem
Human error and social engineering now account for over 80% of devastating data breaches, costing the global economy billions annually. Ignorance is the biggest vulnerability. As long as everyday users lack the tools to verify AI-driven threats, and enterprises lack the kernel-level authority to enforce strict network policies, hackers will consistently exploit the human element to bypass million-dollar security setups. A fragmented approach is no longer enough; survival requires a unified ecosystem.
Idea - Title: AiOS Ecosystem: Centralized Security Policy & Distributed Telemetry Platform

If Other, please provide details of the: AI/ML for Cybersecurity with AIML in Social Change & Awareness
Idea - Description:
The Problem:
Modern cybersecurity is dangerously fragmented. The general public falls victim to highly sophisticated, AI-driven social engineering (Deepfakes, Zero-Day Phishing), while enterprises rely on surface-level browser firewalls that are completely blind to human error and easily bypassed by rogue insiders using VPNs.

Proposed Solution (Idea Description):
AiOS Shield is a holistic, dual-layered ecosystem that bridges public cyber-resilience with hardcore enterprise Zero-Trust architectures.

1. The B2C Public AI Hub (Mitigating Human Error): We democratize security by providing a "Super App" toolkit of 10+ Machine Learning tools for the public. This includes a predictive Zero-Day URL Scanner (using Scikit-Learn to analyze text entropy), Deepfake/Voice-Clone Forensics to detect synthetic media artifacts, and an NLP-driven Smart Helpline that guides cyber-crime victims in real-time.

2. The B2B Enterprise Engine (Eliminating System Vulnerability): An uncompromising, OS-level defense architecture. It features a custom C++ Identity Gate that locks the OS at boot, unsealing the network only after a 4-Layer MFA verified by Face++ Neural Biometrics. Under the hood, a Python-based Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) firewall (PyDivert & Scapy) intercepts and drops unauthorized DNS/IP packets directly at the Network Interface Card, making VPN bypasses impossible.

3. The Central Cloud Brain: A Next.js and Firebase dashboard seamlessly synchronizes Zero-Trust policies across the global fleet. It integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) to autonomously read raw OS telemetry and generate actionable incident reports for IT admins.

Innovation & Impact:
AiOS Shield creates an "AI Data Flywheel." As the public uses our  tools to scan zero-day threats, the global database grows, continuously training our ML models to autonomously fortify the enterprise firewall. We aren't just reacting to known threats; we are predicting the future of cyber-attacks.
Idea - Title: AiOS Shield - Zero-Trust Endpoint Defense, Identity Enforcement Suite & Distributed Telemetry Platform

Idea - Description:
Gunshot detection has become a vital technology for improving safety and ensuring quick 
response to firearm incidents. The proposed system uses an array of omnidirectional 
microphones, FPGA-based real-time processing, and AI-driven algorithms to detect and
localize gunshots with high accuracy. The captured sounds are amplified, filtered, and 
converted into digital signals, which are then classified to distinguish gunshots from other 
noises such as fireworks, thunder, or vehicle backfires. Using Time Difference of Arrival 
(TDoA) and triangulation methods, the system determines the exact direction and distance 
of the gunshot. The processed results are displayed on a graphical LCD, providing clear 
real-time information about the location of the event.
This system is designed to perform reliably even in noisy or echo-prone environments 
like cities, industrial areas, or indoor spaces. By offering fast and precise detection, it can 
significantly support law enforcement, emergency responders, and security agencies in 
reducing response time and saving lives. Beyond public spaces, the technology has strong 
applications in border security, military bases, schools, crowded venues, and sensitive 
zones, where gun-related incidents can pose severe threats. Its adaptability and scalability 
make it a powerful tool not only for public safety but also for defense and homeland 
security. Overall, the system contributes to building safer communities by combining 
advanced signal processing with real-time situational awareness
